summary: Existing MarketRegimeEngine found and audited. Reusable logic with extensions needed.

existing_files_found.pit_assessment: PIT_SAFE - uses only historical rows from prisma query; rolling windows computed from prior rows only

existing_files_found.coverage: detectRegime() only; 8 test cases covering 0/49/50/100/200+ data points, Bull/Bear/Sideways detection, confidence range, limitations presence

existing_files_found.status: ACTIVE - calls detectRegime(), 5-min cache, returns JSON
existing_files_found.pit_assessment: PIT_SAFE - live query, no future data used

existing_files_found.status: Research-only - does not affect alphaScore or production signals

existing_logic_summary.confidence_adjustment: Multiply by 0.6 if MA200 unavailable (< 200 data points)
existing_logic_summary.data_coverage: full >= 200 days / limited 50-199 days / insufficient < 50 days

reusable_components: buildRegimeTimeline() for rolling historical regime labels

deprecated_or_unsafe_components.concern: Uses periodReturn as regime proxy - looks back from endDate and may reflect future information if called with a future endDate. For P4-03 rolling use, prefer buildRegimeTimeline() instead.
deprecated_or_unsafe_components.action: DO_NOT_USE in P4-03 Python script; use rolling asof approach instead

deprecated_or_unsafe_components.concern: H001-H012 retired; regime-stratified results may reference retired experiments
deprecated_or_unsafe_components.action: DEPRECATED for strategy validation; regime detection logic itself is safe to reuse

pit_safety_concerns: detectRegimeForPeriod(): uses periodReturn computed from full period - could leak if endDate is in the future
buildRegimeTimeline(): PIT-safe; evaluates only pricesUpToNow.slice(0, i+1) at each step
detectRegime(): PIT-safe for live use; not suitable for asof_date historical replay without modification

rationale: Existing TypeScript engine cannot be imported by Python script directly
Python script needed for direct SQLite access (no Prisma/Next.js runtime)
Logic is sound and PIT-safe - port the factor scoring to Python
Add missing features: market_breadth_proxy, HIGH_VOLATILITY, LOW_CONFIDENCE labels
Add evidence_flags and pit_safety_flags per P4-03 requirements
p4_03_decision.alignment_with_existing: HIGH - same MA/momentum/volatility factor structure, same score-based voting
